source_binary_type: PE32+ GUI x86-64 (Tauri single-file build, base 0x140000000, MSVC linker 14.44); NOT an NSIS installer
extraction_method: tauri-dumper run directly on installer PE (assets embedded in .rdata); 7zz only yielded PE sections (no NSIS overlay present)

tooling.unpacker: extract_windows_package.py (7zz -> PE sections only, no candidate app PE found)

diff_vs_mac.asset_bytes: 30/30 JS+CSS byte-identical (SHA256); index.html differs only by CRLF/LF line-endings + 1 trailing blank line (1487B win vs 1455B mac), content identical
diff_vs_mac.verdict: win frontend == mac frontend (SAME React/Vite build). Proven by byte-level SHA256, not inferred. Win frontend command surface is therefore TRUE first-party win evidence, not mac extrapolation.

implication: Confirms (with first-party win-PE-derived bytes) the prior assertion in INDEX session wf-aimami109-win-dim1-link that the shared frontend bundle is identical mac<->win. Upgrades that dim1-shared-CCF-link basis from asserted to byte-proven.
